registry_row_zh.理想任务类型: 金融新闻到价格/市场 forecasting
registry_row_zh.理由: 大规模金融新闻 + stock/market rows，适合快速扩充金融文本-时序 CPT；需要 dedup 和时间切分控制。

ts_source: Zihan1004/FNSPID on Hugging Face — daily stock close prices for 4,775 S&P500 tickers, 1999–2023
text_source: Same-day financial news wire articles paired with stock prices (real first-party news text)
pairing_method: One CPT record per (ticker, news_date): unique news articles concatenated + historical close-price series ending day before news date; Alpaca forecast output discarded
effort_estimate: 4–8 h for CPT export script; full-scale requires dedup/sampling pipeline
probe_notes: Local demo files: FNSPID_train.json (360 rows) + FNSPID_val.json (40 rows), 2 tickers (AAL, A), 2019 only. 231/400 rows have news; many articles are broad market commentary attributed to multiple tickers. History window fixed at 7 days in demo slice.
caveats: News articles often cover the full market, not just the tagged ticker — text–ticker link is noisy
Local demo files are a tiny slice (2 tickers, 2019); full scale requires HuggingFace download
Future prices from Alpaca output field are discarded — CPT uses history only, no lookahead
At 15.7M news records, full dataset needs dedup and sampling before CPT training
Research use license; commercial restrictions apply per original FNSPID terms
